text.title: Vector DB Prod Setup — Procedure
text.summary: Six steps: pick storage class → size resources → HA strategy → backup + restore → checklist → ship + monitor.

step.name: pick-storage-class
step.input: cluster storage class catalog + IO requirements
step.action: Select durable storage class (EBS gp3 / Premium SSD / Ceph RBD). Estimate size at 12mo growth.
step.decision-gate: If only emptyDir available — STOP; switch to a managed-storage K8s (r1-durable-persistence).

step.name: size-resources
step.action: Compute memory = vectors × dim × bytes_per_dim × 1.5 (HNSW overhead). CPU = baseline + concurrent QPS. Set requests + limits.

step.name: ha-strategy
step.action: Milvus/Weaviate: enable distributed mode + ≥3 replicas. Qdrant: single + snapshot loop. pgvector: PG streaming replication.
step.decision-gate: If HA mismatched with DB class — fix (r3-ha-per-db-class).

step.name: backup-and-restore-drill
step.action: Schedule daily snapshot via CronJob. Lock retention ≥30d. Run restore in staging from latest snapshot; time it; record `last_restore_drill`.
step.decision-gate: If restore drill fails — block ship; backup chain broken (r4-backup-and-restore-drilled).

step.name: pre-deploy-checklist
step.action: Verify monitoring scrapes DB endpoint. Confirm security-config applied. Run dry-run deploy in staging.
step.decision-gate: If any check fails — fix before continuing.

step.name: ship-and-post-verify
step.action: Deploy via blue/green. Run post-deploy smoke (ingest + search + delete). Verify p95 within band.
